roles.name: owner
roles.description: System owner. Can transfer ownership, manage privileged roles, approve production publish, change policy, and perform emergency overrides.

roles.name: service_admin
roles.description: Internal CloudSigma admin/operator. Can manage most system operations and roles, but cannot transfer ownership.

roles.name: reviewer
roles.description: Approves publish requests and AI-suggested instruction/script changes. Can reject or defer changes.

roles.name: maintainer
roles.description: Operational role. Can trigger discovery, builds, tests, retries, staging preparation, and failure investigation.

roles.name: viewer
roles.description: Read-only access to status, queue, logs, test results, runbook, and audit history.

service_accounts.name: image-automation
service_accounts.description: Scheduled automation actor for discovery, build, test, and queue updates. Cannot approve or transfer ownership.

notes: This role model aligns structurally with CloudSigma's TaaS and OmniSupport hierarchy.
Ownership is singular and managed separately from normal role assignment.
Automation is modeled as a service account, not a human role.
